classification.task_goal: Automate data population and validation in Excel sheets using formulas and VBA.
primary_constraints: Use formulas to populate G2, H2, and I2 in Sheet Job Request based on the selected contact name.
Ensure that all required fields (A2, B2, C2, D2, E2) are filled before executing the VBA code.
Open the specific sheet indicated in I2 only if all required fields are not blank.
classification.reasoning: The user identified issues with the formulas and VBA code, prompting corrections and adjustments to ensure the constraints were met. The assistant provided solutions that were accepted and implemented by the user.
